name: large-clip-vault
title: Large Clip Vault
description: Vault for large text that the clipboard history does not support.
author: teeranade_cheng

commands.name: large-clip-vault
commands.title: Large Clip Vault
commands.description: Vault for large text that the clipboard history does not support.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
